zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Montague於大約1242年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特文卡頓時，她的父親William de Montacute32歲，母親Berthe31歲。她於1256年1月16日之前與Thomas de Aldham在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年8月28日享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Montague于大约1242年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特文卡頓时，她的父亲William de Montacute32岁，母亲Berthe31岁。她于1256年1月16日之前与Thomas de Aldham在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年8月28日享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Montague was born about 1242, in Wincanton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Montacute, was 32 and her mother, Berthe, was 31. She married Thomas de Aldham before 16 January 1256, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 August 1285, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Montague est née environ 1242, à Wincanton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Montacute, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Berthe, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Aldham avant 16 janvier 1256, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1285, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Montague um 1242 in Wincanton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Montacute 32 und ihre Mutter Berthe 31. Sie hat vor 16. Januar 1256 in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Aldham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. August 1285 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Montague è nata il circa 1242 nel Wincanton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Montacute, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Berthe, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Aldham prima del 16 gennaio 1256, nel Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 agosto 1285, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Montagueが約1242年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィンカントンで生まれた時，父William de Montacuteは32歳，母Bertheは31歳であった。1256年1月16日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターでThomas de Aldhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年8月28日に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Montague(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윈캔턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Montacute(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Berthe(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1256년 1월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 Thomas de Aldham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 8월 28일 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Montague nasceu aproximadamente 1242, em Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Montacute, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Berthe, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Aldham antes 16 de janeiro de 1256, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1285, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Montague родилась около 1242 г. в местности винкантон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Montacute было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Berthe, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Aldham перед 16 январь 1256 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 августа 1285 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Montague nació aproximadamente 1242, en Wincanton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Montacute, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Berthe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas de Aldham antes de 16 de enero de 1256, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1285, a la edad de 44 años.
